types.name: me.ddayo.aris.client.gui.element.ScriptCheckboxRenderer
types.description:
A square checkbox that toggles its [isChecked] state when clicked.
 Occupies a [size] x [size] box (in the parent's coordinate space) that captures clicks.

types.name: me.ddayo.aris.client.gui.element.ScriptTextInputRenderer
types.description:
An editable single-line text field. The component occupies a [width] x [height] box
 (in the parent's coordinate space) that captures clicks for focus and cursor placement,
 and keyboard/character events while focused. Supports selection, clipboard (copy/cut/paste),
 word-wise navigation and horizontal scrolling.

methods.name: get_is_scale_rate_fixed
methods.description:
Determines if the scale rate is locked.
 If true, [xScale] and [yScale] cannot be modified individually.

The scale factor on the X axis.

methods.name: set_scale
methods.description:
A utility property to set or get uniform scaling for both X and Y axes.
 Getting this property asserts that [xScale] equals [yScale].

A utility property to set or get uniform scaling for both X and Y axes.
 Getting this property asserts that [xScale] equals [yScale].

methods.name: set_mouse_up_hook
methods.description:
Sets the Lua function to be called when a mouse button is released (mouse up) within the component's area.

 The Lua function will receive the following arguments:
 1. `mx` (Double): The X coordinate of the mouse cursor.
 2. `my` (Double): The Y coordinate of the mouse cursor.
 3. `button` (Int): The index of the mouse button pressed.

 @param fn The Lua function to serve as the callback.

methods.name: clear_mouse_up_hook
methods.description: Removes the currently assigned mouse up hook, disabling the callback.

methods.name: set_mouse_down_hook
methods.description:
Sets the Lua function to be called when a mouse button is pressed (mouse down) within the component's area.

 The Lua function will receive the following arguments:
 1. `mx` (Double): The X coordinate of the mouse cursor.
 2. `my` (Double): The Y coordinate of the mouse cursor.
 3. `button` (Int): The index of the mouse button pressed.

 @param fn The Lua function to serve as the callback.

methods.name: clear_mouse_down_hook
methods.description: Removes the currently assigned mouse down hook, disabling the callback.

methods.name: set_mouse_drag_hook
methods.description:
Sets the Lua function to be called when the mouse is dragged within the component's area.

 The Lua function will receive the following arguments:
 1. `mx` (Double): The X coordinate of the mouse cursor.
 2. `my` (Double): The Y coordinate of the mouse cursor.
 3. `button` (Int): The index of the mouse button being held.

 @param fn The Lua function to serve as the callback.

methods.name: clear_mouse_drag_hook
methods.description: Removes the currently assigned mouse drag hook, disabling the callback.

methods.name: set_key_down_hook
methods.description:
Sets the Lua function to be called when a keyboard key is pressed (key down).

 The Lua function will receive the following arguments:
 1. `keyCode` (Int): The unique ID of the key (GLFW key constant, e.g., 256 for ESC).
 2. `scanCode` (Int): The platform-specific hardware scancode of the key.
 3. `modifiers` (Int): A bitmask representing modifier keys held down (Shift, Ctrl, Alt, etc.).

 @param fn The Lua function to serve as the callback.

methods.name: clear_key_down_hook
methods.description: Removes the currently assigned key down hook, disabling the callback.

methods.name: set_key_up_hook
methods.description:
Sets the Lua function to be called when a keyboard key is released (key up).

 The Lua function will receive the following arguments:
 1. `keyCode` (Int): The unique ID of the key (GLFW key constant).
 2. `scanCode` (Int): The platform-specific hardware scancode of the key.
 3. `modifiers` (Int): A bitmask representing modifier keys held down (Shift, Ctrl, Alt, etc.).

 @param fn The Lua function to serve as the callback.

methods.name: clear_key_up_hook
methods.description: Removes the currently assigned key up hook, disabling the callback.

methods.name: set_close_hook
clear_close_hook

methods.name: open
methods.description:
Opens this component as the current Minecraft screen (GUI).
